history.content: What are all of Kevins action items?

Kevin's action items are:
1. Pair with Aisha to validate the auth fix on staging (Due: April 8, 2026)
2. Loop in QA on the iOS deep link fix (Due: April 8, 2026)
3. Start the Firebase Cloud Messaging migration plan (Due: April 18, 2026)

These are mentioned in the meeting transcript, specifically at timestamps [12:15], [28:00], and [26:00] respectively, as well as in the ACTION ITEMS section at the end of the transcript.

📎 Source: q3_sync_meeting.txt, various timestamps and ACTION ITEMS section
What is his deadline for the Firebase migration?

Kevin's deadline for completing the Firebase Cloud Messaging migration is April 18th.

📎 Source: q3_sync_meeting.txt, [26:00]
